commands.label: Start workspace
commands.detail: Launch Convex dev plus the Next.js app for the full local loop.
commands.proof: Starts Convex dev and the Next.js workspace together.

commands.label: Type contract
commands.detail: Verify TypeScript, Convex bindings, and package boundaries before review.
commands.proof: Verifies TypeScript, package boundaries, and generated Convex bindings.

commands.label: Code hygiene
commands.detail: Run ESLint across the monorepo and catch UI/runtime drift early.
commands.proof: Enforces the shared ESLint rules across the monorepo.

commands.label: Format gate
commands.detail: Confirm Prettier formatting without mutating files.
commands.proof: Confirms Prettier formatting without mutating files.

commands.label: Unit evidence
commands.detail: Exercise app, Convex, hooks, components, and runtime behavior with Bun.
commands.proof: Runs Bun unit and component coverage across the repo.

commands.label: Browser acceptance
commands.detail: Validate the editor, agent run, permissions, and sharing flows in Playwright.
commands.proof: Runs focused Playwright acceptance for editor, agent-run, permissions, and sharing flows.

commands.label: Production gate
commands.detail: Compile the deployable app after tests, lint, and typecheck are clean.

commands.label: Full web gate
commands.detail: Run command drift checks, typecheck, lint, format check, web tests, and build in sequence.
commands.proof: Runs command drift checks, typecheck, lint, format check, web tests, and build in sequence.
